name: CTA with right-side image (default — Purple + Email_Primary_2_column.png)
description: Default CTA variant: text + button left, approved image right, on the image's required background color (Purple). Dark-background rule: white heading/body, white button fill, green label.
notes: Swap variants by changing both background-color and image src together: LPGA → #0F99BC + Email_Primary_column_golf.png; alternate general → #7B7BED + Cake_lockup.png.
